footer.disclaimer: Treble Quest is an independent, fan-made football draft game. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any football club, league, competition, governing body, game publisher, or ratings provider. Player, club and season references are used descriptively.

meta.site_title: Treble Quest - Draft Seven Picks. Chase Three Trophies.
meta.site_description: Draft a football squad and simulate a Premier League, FA Cup and Champions League treble chase.

modes.classic_hint: Manager plus a full XI, including exact RB, CB, CM and front-three slots. English football.
modes.global_hint: Legendary teams from all eras and all leagues: Porto 2004, Nacional 2008/09, Barcelona 2010/11, Real Madrid 2013/14, and more.
modes.world_cup_hint: A national-team run built around the 8-0 champion path.
modes.legacy_hint: Draft the all-time XI from one legendary club across every season in our data.

formations.433_hint: Best for control, wide forwards, and balanced squads.
formations.442_hint: Classic two-striker shape with wide midfielders and a sturdy spine.
formations.4231_hint: Adds an attacking midfielder without losing the back four.
formations.343_hint: High-upside shape with wing-backs and three centre-backs.

cookie.title: Help improve Treble Quest?
cookie.body: Analytics help spot broken flows, popular modes, and where the game needs polish. No ads, no accounts, and Google Analytics only loads if you accept.

about.headline: A two-minute treble argument.
about.p1: Treble Quest is a small, independent football draft game about impossible squad debates: peak seasons, tactical fits, cup nerve, and the joy of seeing a drafted team chase the lot.
about.p2: It is intentionally compact. No transfer windows, no wage budgets, no inbox admin. Pick seven, simulate, share the damage.

how_to_play.headline: Draft clean. Simulate fast.
how_to_play.p1: Quick Mode gives you the compact Treble Quest draft: manager, goalkeeper, two defenders, two midfielders, two forwards, and a super sub. Classic Mode asks for a formation first, then drafts a manager, a full XI, and a super sub.
how_to_play.p2: Ratings are internal Treble Quest values, not copied from any game or ratings provider. Chemistry comes from club, season, nationality links, squad balance, and slot fit.
how_to_play.step2: Draft one of three options for the active slot.
how_to_play.step3: Simulate the league, FA Cup, and Champions League chase.

privacy.headline: No accounts. No server state.
privacy.p1: Treble Quest runs in your browser. Current run progress is saved to LocalStorage on your device so you can resume a draft or view a completed result.
privacy.p2: The app has no backend, database, authentication, or external UI services. Clearing the run removes the saved game state from this browser.
privacy.p3: Treble Quest can use Google Analytics to understand basic usage patterns and improve the game, but the analytics script only loads after you accept analytics cookies. If you decline, that choice is stored in LocalStorage and Google Analytics is not loaded.

support.meta_description: Support Treble Quest on Ko-fi and help keep the independent football draft game online, updated, and growing.
support.headline: Help Treble Quest keep chasing.
support.p1: Treble Quest is built independently: the rating data, balance passes, formations, UI polish, hosting, and new season pools all take real time to keep sharp.
support.p2: If the game has given you a good argument, a ridiculous draft, or one of those "surely this team wins everything" runs that immediately falls apart, Ko-fi support helps the project stay online and keep improving.
support.fund1_desc: Deeper club-season sets, more cult picks, and better position coverage.
support.fund2_desc: Ratings tweaks so legends feel special without every run becoming obvious.
support.fund3_desc: Hosting, polish, mobile fixes, share tools, and small quality-of-life upgrades.
support.cta: Support on Ko-fi and help the next batch of squads make it into the game.
